name: ship-it
title: Ship It
description: Deploy services via sdc with auto-discovery, Linear ticket integration, and Slack message generation
author: team

commands.name: deploy
commands.title: Deploy Service
commands.description: Deploy a service to one or all environments

preferences.name: projectsDirectory
preferences.title: Projects Directory
preferences.description: Root directory containing all repository clones

preferences.name: ignoredDirectories
preferences.title: Ignored Directories
preferences.description: Comma-separated directory names to skip in service discovery (common and pkg are always ignored)

preferences.name: sdcPath
preferences.title: sdc Binary Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the sdc binary. Leave empty to use PATH lookup.
